---
title: ""
date: ""
---

### **Professional Background**

\ \ {{< fa chart-line size=normalsize >}} \ \ **Data Science:** Statistical programming; Interactive dashboard design;<br>
\ \ {{< fa gears size=normalsize >}} \ **Data Engineering:** End-to-end ETL data pipeline design & automation; Querying & Harmonizing datasets;<br>
\ \ {{< fa server size=normalsize >}} \ \ **Data Management:** Data centralization; governance; high-performance computing clusters;<br>
\ \ {{< fa brain size=normalsize >}} \ \ **Neuroimaging:** Magnetic Resonance (MR) image processing and analysis of the human brain.

<br>

### **Programming & Tools:**
::: columns
::: {.column width="40%"}
-   **R** (tidyverse, targets, Shiny)
-   **Python** (pandas, nibabel, scikit-learn)
-   **MATLAB**
:::

::: {.column width="35%"}
-   **Git** 
-   **Shell Scripting** (Bash, zsh)
-   **Docker**
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
-   **XNAT**
-   **FlyWheel**
-   **FSL**
:::
:::

<br>

###  Experience

::: columns
::: {.column width="9%"}
![](images/keck_med_seal.png){.absolute width="55"}
:::

::: {.column width="91%"}
`Jun 2025 - Present`{style="float: right; font-size: 12px;"} **USC's Neuroimaging and Informatics Institute, Los Angeles CA** <br/> Data Engineer (Resource Employee), *Laboratory of NeuroImaging* <br/>

- Built and maintained a secure Linux-based research server to support multi-site neuroimaging data governance,
querying, and analysis workflows.
- Deployed and managed imaging informatics platform (XNAT) to centralize MRI data and establish
infrastructure for multi-site neuroimaging research projects.
- Collaborated with Principal Investigator to adapt infrastructure and data workflows to changing analytical and
experimental requirements.

:::
:::

<br>

::: columns
::: {.column width="9%"}
![](images/chla_logo.png){.absolute width="55"}
:::

::: {.column width="91%"}
`Jun 2025 - Present`{style="float: right; font-size: 12px;"} **Children's Hospital Los Angeles, Los Angeles CA** 
<br/> Research Assistant, *Computational Imaging of Brain Organization Research Group*

- Developed automated, containerized neuroimaging preprocessing pipelines (Docker-based), improving
reproducibility and efficiency of analytical workflows.
- Generated analysis-ready brain MRI datasets to support interpretation of neuroimaging signals and
downstream machine learning and statistical analyses.
- Implemented data quality control and validation procedures to ensure reliability of cleaned datasets and
downstream analysis and reporting.
:::
:::

<br>

::: columns
::: {.column width="9%"}
![](images/mgh_logo.png){.absolute width="55"}
:::

::: {.column width="91%"}
`Oct 2022 - Jul 2024`{style="float: right; font-size: 12px;"} **Massachusetts General Hospital, Boston MA** <br/> Programmer, *Center for Addiction Medicine* <br/>

- Designed and maintained end-to-end ETL data pipelines (Git version-controlled) to ingest and process incoming
clinical trial research data, generating clean datasets and statistical results.
- Developed dashboards to monitor data ingestion, identify missing or inconsistent data, and improve
visualization of summary statistics to support ongoing data reviews.
- Led recurring data review sessions, identifying data trends, inconsistencies, or risks, and opportunities to
improve data quality and workflow efficiency.
- Collaborated with biostatisticians and investigators to support statistical analysis and interpretation of complex
behavioral and biomedical data.
- Managed EDC research databases and automated data extraction via API integration with a strong oversight on
data quality.
- Compiled and harmonized longitudinal datasets and metadata to enable cross-cohort analysis.
- Trained programmers on code reproducibility, software engineering, and privacy regulations in research.
:::
:::

<br>

::: columns
::: {.column width="9%"}
![](images/barilan_logo.png){.absolute width="55"}
:::

::: {.column width="91%"}
**Bar-Ilan University, Tel-Aviv - Israel** `Aug 2020 - Dec 2020`{style="float: right;"} <br/> Research Intern, *Developmental Neuropsychology Lab* <br/>

-   Data processing, cleaning, and analysis for eye-tracking data to measure EEG and gaze coordination patterns using repeated measures ANOVA.
:::
:::

<br>
